message:
fix(client,font): remove unnecessary return, suppress unexpected_cfgs lint

Remove unnecessary return statement before format! in Unix X11 discovery
path. Add unexpected_cfgs lint allow for cargo_clippy cfg check in
font Cargo.toml and core_text fallback list builder to silence compiler
warnings on stable toolchains that don't define the cfg.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -56,3 +56,6 @@ objc.workspace = true
 [dev-dependencies]
 env_logger.workspace = true
 k9.workspace = true
+
+[lints.rust]
+unexpected_cfgs = { level = "allow", check-cfg = ['cfg(cargo_clippy)'] }
